title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Sugar Cosmetics - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Sugar Cosmetics - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Sugar Cosmetics! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Vijayawada team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Sugar Cosmetics:
Sugar Cosmetics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sugar Cosmetics!
